lists.title: Oprah's Book Club
lists.subtitle: Since 1996
lists.description: Books selected by Oprah Winfrey for her book club since its founding in 1996 — one of the most influential reading lists in history.

lists.title: Reese's Book Club
lists.subtitle: Since 2017
lists.description: Monthly picks from Reese Witherspoon's book club, spotlighting women-led stories with heart, grit, and unforgettable characters.

lists.title: Obama's Favorite Books
lists.subtitle: Annual picks since 2015
lists.description: Barack Obama's annual reading lists — fiction, nonfiction, and everything in between, curated by one of the most well-read presidents in American history.

lists.title: NYT Notable Books 2024
lists.subtitle: 100 books · Fiction & Nonfiction
lists.description: The New York Times Book Review's 100 Notable Books of 2024 — the year's standout fiction, poetry, and nonfiction as chosen by the editors.

lists.title: Booker Prize Winners
lists.subtitle: Since 1969
lists.description: Every winner of the Booker Prize — the world's most prestigious literary award for fiction in English — from 1969 to today.

lists.title: Pulitzer Prize Fiction
lists.subtitle: Since 1948
lists.description: Every Pulitzer Prize winner for Fiction — America's most coveted literary prize, awarded annually to the best novel by an American author.

lists.title: Goodreads Choice: Fiction
lists.subtitle: Annual winners since 2009
lists.description: The winner of the Goodreads Choice Award for Best Fiction each year — voted on by millions of readers. A reliable signal for what people actually loved, not just what critics praised.
